rules.rule_text:
title: Aotera_Dropper
id: b8c8f53a-9520-4289-a6ce-a725c1567b35
description: 'New Dropper (Oct 2025). The malware appears to use the open-source project
  Donut to load a 2nd stage payload into memory. Detects requests to specific URI
  patterns observed in campaign telemetry.

  '
status: experimental
author: Kim Bokholm, Amata Anantaprayoon
date: 2026-01-14
modified: 2026-01-14
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection_uri_initial_infection:
    uri_path|re: ^/new/log/[0-9a-fA-F]{8}/(?:success/\d{10}|startLoader/\d{10}|startCrypt)$
  selection_uri_2ndstage:
    uri_path|re: ^/n(?:front|back)\.php$
  condition: selection_uri_initial_infection or selection_uri_2ndstage
falsepositives:
- Web application endpoints that legitimately use matching paths
level: high
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
references:
- https://www.joesandbox.com/analysis/1795404/1/html#HTTP_Packets
